title: 10 Herbal Creams For Fluid Retention
description: Lavandula angustifolia creams contains the essential oils linalool and linalyl acetate, which have diuretic properties. These compounds help to increase urine production and reduce water retention in the body. Linalool also has a mild anti-inflammatory effect, which can help to alleviate swelling and discomfort associated with fluid retention.
